# D2G Technology

D2G Technology builds affordable, professional websites for small businesses, entrepreneurs, and solopreneurs — entirely over the phone. No tech skills required.

## Services

- The Launchpad: $999 — single-page high-converting landing site with mobile-first design, lead capture form, premium branding integration, and 1 round of revisions.
- The Presence: $1,499 — full 3-page website (Home, About, Services) with advanced lead capture, performance optimization, comprehensive on-page SEO, 2 rounds of revisions, and priority support.

## Process

1. Book a free 30-minute strategy call.
2. Receive a first draft.
3. Give feedback on a second call.
4. Launch — typically within days or weeks.

## Contact

Book a free strategy call: https://dg-technologies-landing.replit.app/#book

## FAQ

Q: How much does a website cost?
A: $999 for The Launchpad (single-page site) or $1,499 for The Presence (3-page website). Flat fees, no surprises.

Q: How long does it take?
A: Most clients launch within days or weeks — not months.

Q: Do I need to be tech-savvy?
A: No. The entire process is done over the phone.
